calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar May-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Institute on Aging. Carrie Molten from Institute on Aging. Guardian Ad Litim Caroline Hinshaw is present.

The Court asked Ms. Hinshaw to address the statement of risk of the proposal. Ms. Hinshaw reported that she is concerned about the change in title, that Fredricka wants to stay in her own home, that the current version of the contract is modified with her input and that this proposal is a creative way to keep Fredricka home.

Mr. Kato reported that this proposal grants the trustee the option to repurchase the property, that it provides funds for Fredricka and the only risk is a decrease in property value.

The Court asked is there are any other alternatives. Carrie responded that there are other options and they are as follows:

1. Life estate- there is no real market for this option and it only happens between family members.
2. Life tenancy- Price is quite discounted with significant capital gains taxes and if Fredricka needed to leave the property she would not benefit from the discount.
3. Full sale of property- with Fredricka going into a facility.

Furthermore Carrie stated that the mortgage can not be paid this month and she is unsure when a foreclosure proceeding would begin and that the other.

The Court took the petition for order confirming trust property under submission.

Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Nancy Wong/ Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Continued To May-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
